title: A Grushin problem for Bismut's hypoelliptic Laplacian
summary: We study in this article the combined asymptotic analysis of Bismut's hypoelliptic Laplacian, in the high friction b $\rightarrow$ 0+ and possibly low temperature h $\rightarrow$ 0+ regimes.

AI.tldr: 研究Bismut亚椭圆Laplacian在强摩擦极限b→0+和低温极限h→0+下的联合渐近分析
AI.motivation: Bismut亚椭圆Laplacian是连接椭圆算子和亚椭圆算子的重要桥梁，研究其在强摩擦和低温极限下的渐近行为对于理解随机过程、热核估计和几何分析具有重要意义
AI.techniques: 使用亚椭圆算子理论、渐近分析方法、参数摄动技术，结合高摩擦极限和低温极限的联合分析框架
AI.main_theorems: 建立Bismut亚椭圆Laplacian在双参数极限b→0+和h→0+下的渐近展开，分析极限算子的收敛性和谱性质
AI.significance: 为亚椭圆算子的渐近分析提供新视角，深化对随机过程极限行为的理解，在几何分析和数学物理中有潜在应用

title: Conservation laws of nonlinear PDEs arising in elasticity and acoustics in Cartesian, cylindrical, and spherical geometries
comment: To appear in Open Communications in Nonlinear Mathematical Physics. Special Issue in Honor of George W. Bluman, 2025 (27 pages, 6 tables, 54 references)
summary: Conservation laws are computed for various nonlinear partial differential equations that arise in elasticity and acoustics. Using a scaling homogeneity approach, conservation laws are established for two models describing shear wave propagation in a circular cylinder and a cylindrical annulus. Next, using the multiplier method, conservation laws are derived for a parameterized system of constitutive equations in cylindrical coordinates involving a general expression for the Cauchy stress. Conservation laws for the Khokhlov-Zabolotskaya-Kuznetsov equation and Westervelt-type equations in various coordinate systems are also presented.

AI.tldr: 该论文为弹性力学和声学中的非线性偏微分方程建立了守恒律
AI.motivation: 研究弹性力学和声学中非线性偏微分方程的守恒律，这些方程描述圆柱和圆柱环中的剪切波传播，以及更一般的参数化本构方程系统
AI.techniques: 使用尺度齐次性方法和乘子法来推导守恒律
AI.main_theorems: 为圆柱和圆柱环剪切波传播模型建立了守恒律；为圆柱坐标系下参数化本构方程系统推导了守恒律；给出了Khokhlov-Zabolotskaya-Kuznetsov方程和Westervelt型方程在各种坐标系下的守恒律
AI.significance: 为非线性弹性波和声波传播问题提供了守恒律分析框架，这些守恒律在物理建模、数值模拟和解析解构造中具有重要应用价值
